title: Opening for Software Engineer at Lendingkart

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Lendingkart
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lendingkart family as a Software Engineer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lendingkart:
Lendingkart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
